link_repair.note: Stale or renamed public URLs are repaired to working source pages before publication. Links are not removed as a substitute for repair.

source_access.note: Every evidence row should have a verified public URL or remain visibly marked as source-access-required. Missing source access is never treated as completion.
Every evidence row should have a verified public URL or remain visibly marked as source-access-required. Missing source access is never treated as completion.

unverified_link_access.note: All public source URLs passed link verification after deterministic repairs.
